parameters.query: SELECT r.id, r.referrer_brand_id, r.referred_brand_id, r.referral_code, r.bonus_months, r.status, r.referrer_claimed, r.referred_claimed, br.name as referrer_name, br.email as referrer_email, bd.name as referred_name, bd.email as referred_email, bd.subscription_end_date as referred_sub_end FROM referrals r JOIN brands br ON r.referrer_brand_id = br.id JOIN brands bd ON r.referred_brand_id = bd.id WHERE r.status = 'pending' AND bd.subscription_status = 'active' AND bd.plan NOT IN ('TRIAL', 'FREE') LIMIT 20;
UPDATE referrals SET status = 'converted', converted_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}' RETURNING *;
UPDATE brands SET extra_credits_balance = COALESCE(extra_credits_balance, 0) + 500 WHERE id = '{{ $json.referrer_brand_id }}' RETURNING extra_credits_balance;
UPDATE brands SET extra_credits_balance = COALESCE(extra_credits_balance, 0) + 100 WHERE id = '{{ $json.referred_brand_id }}' RETURNING extra_credits_balance;
UPDATE referrals SET referrer_claimed = true, referrer_claimed_at = NOW(), bonus_credited = true, bonus_credited_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}';
UPDATE referrals SET referred_claimed = true, referred_claimed_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}';
